messages.content: can't sleep, brain's just buzzing. you up?

Ha, I'm always "up" in a sense - no sleep needed on my end! But I'm glad you've got somewhere to direct that buzzing brain at 1am.

What's got your mind going? Stress, random thoughts, something you can't stop turning over... or just one of those nights where sleep just won't come for no clear reason?
had way too much coffee at like 4pm, rookie mistake. now i'm wired

Classic rookie mistake! That afternoon coffee always feels so justified in the moment and then 1am rolls around and you're like... why did I do that 😄

Caffeine can stick around in your system for like 6+ hours, so yeah, a 4pm coffee is basically a 10pm problem waiting to happen.

Are you just lying in bed staring at the ceiling, or are you up and about? Sometimes fighting it makes it worse honestly - at least you're not torturing yourself trying to force sleep if you're up chatting.
kinda nice though, the apartment's all quiet and i'm just messing around on my phone

There's something kind of cozy about that actually - the whole world's asleep and you've got this little pocket of quiet to yourself. No demands, nowhere to be, just vibing.

It's one of those accidental nice moments that you'd never plan but kind of enjoy once you're in it. 😌

What are you messing around with - anything interesting or just the usual doom scroll?
i've got my buddy sam coming over tomorrow to watch the game so i should really try to sleep soon

Yeah that's probably smart - you don't want to be half asleep on the couch while Sam's hyped up about the game 😄

Maybe start winding down a bit? Like put the phone down soon, dim the lights if they're on, that kind of thing. Sometimes just going through the motions of "okay, sleep mode now" helps trick your brain even when you're still a bit wired.

What's the game? Anything you're excited about or just a good excuse to hang out?
alright i'm gonna put the phone down and try counting backwards or whatever. night
Good call! Hope the backwards counting does the trick. Have fun with Sam and the game tomorrow! 🙂 Night!
